title: Set up Hono API in a Next.js project
summary: Hono v4 integration for Next.js — typed RPC client, middleware, Zod validation, and edge-compatible Route Handlers.
declaration: I will set up Hono v4 as the API layer for this Next.js project. Hono is a fast, edge-compatible web framework with built-in TypeScript support and an optional RPC client that provides end-to-end type safety similar to tRPC, but with standard HTTP semantics. If you only need a basic REST API without the RPC client, say so and I will simplify the setup.
